item.title: Notiqflow 0.4.0
item.description:
Notiqflow 0.4.0

  • A brand-new Notiqflow window. Open Notiqflow from the menu bar (or ⌘,) for a full app window with a sidebar: Home, Insights, Dictionary, Snippets, Style, Scratchpad, Settings, and Help. All your existing settings moved in — nothing was removed.
  • See your dictation at a glance. Home shows your total words dictated, average words per minute, and day streak, plus a day-by-day timeline of recent dictations. Insights adds words-per-day, your most-dictated apps, and language mix. Everything is computed on your Mac — nothing leaves your device.
  • Smarter correction learning. When you fix a word after dictating, Notiqflow now reliably notices and asks whether to remember the change. It waits until you finish typing, follows along if you keep refining the same word, works in more apps (including ones that reformat pasted text), and gives you longer to respond.
  • Snippets. Create a spoken trigger phrase that expands into full text — say "email sig" and Notiqflow inserts your whole signature.
  • Your writing style, visible. The new Style section shows the per-app writing preferences Notiqflow has learned from your corrections — confirm or dismiss each one.
  • Scratchpad. A built-in place to dictate freely; your text is saved automatically.

Note: average words per minute builds from dictations made on 0.4.0 and later, since recording duration wasn't stored before.
